recommendations.title: Stars 80, la suite
recommendations.overview: Vincent and Antoine, tired of the tours, decide to go on holiday with all the troop of Stars 80.

recommendations.title: Catch Me If You Can
recommendations.overview: A true story about Frank Abagnale Jr. who, before his 19th birthday, successfully conned millions of dollars worth of checks as a Pan Am pilot, doctor, and legal prosecutor. An FBI agent makes it his mission to put him behind bars. But Frank not only

recommendations.title: The Lover
recommendations.overview: A poor French teenage girl engages in an illicit affair with a wealthy Chinese heir in 1920s Saigon. For the first time in her young life she has control, and she wields it deftly over her besotted lover throughout a series of clandestine meetings an

recommendations.title: Paris Je T'aime
recommendations.overview: Olivier Assayas, Gus Van Sant, Wes Craven and Alfonso Cuaron are among the 20 distinguished directors who contribute to this collection of 18 stories, each exploring a different aspect of Parisian life. The colourful characters in this drama include
recommendations.director: Gurinder Chadha, Daniela Thomas, Joel Coen, Frédéric Auburtin, Gérard Depardieu, Nobuhiro Suwa, Richard LaGravenese, Bruno Podalydès, Vincenzo Natali, Walter Salles, Ethan Coen, Alfonso Cuarón, Alexander Payne, Tom Tykwer, Isabel Coixet, Oliver Schmitz, Christopher Doyle, Olivier Assayas, Sylvain Chomet, Gus Van Sant, Wes Craven

recommendations.title: The Irishman
recommendations.overview: Pennsylvania, 1956. Frank Sheeran, a war veteran of Irish origin who works as a truck driver, accidentally meets mobster Russell Bufalino. Once Frank becomes his trusted man, Bufalino sends him to Chicago with the task of helping Jimmy Hoffa, a power

recommendations.title: Contact
recommendations.overview: A radio astronomer receives the first extraterrestrial radio signal ever picked up on Earth. As the world powers scramble to decipher the message and decide upon a course of action, she must make some difficult decisions between her beliefs, the trut

recommendations.title: More the Merrier
recommendations.overview: Multiple stories about the oscillating world of couple relationships and how difficult it can be to separate sex from love.

recommendations.title: Radio Day
recommendations.overview: It's the day of radio in Russia. The radio station staff decides to invite famous bands, who will perform live for the ship with animals stranded in the Sea of Japan. And something goes wrong!

recommendations.title: Elections Day
recommendations.overview: The employees of a radio station in Moscow are forced to organize the elections campaign for a future governor in one of Russia districts.

recommendations.title: Tune in for Love
recommendations.overview: During the 1990s, hardworking Mi-soo and optimistic Hyun-woo meet at a bakery and fall in love while exchanging stories on a radio station, but while their paths keep crossing, the timing never seems to work out.
